changelog: CI/CD: dropped the macOS build matrix entries (`macos-13` x64 and `macos-14` arm64). GitHub-hosted macOS runners were stuck queued for hours and blocking every release. The matrix now ships Windows x64 and Linux x64/arm64 only; macOS users can build from source until macOS runners are restored.
Release job no longer publishes `jpg2pdf-macos-x64` / `jpg2pdf-macos-arm64` assets.
